story.title: Add maxTaskExecutionRetries with self-repair feedback loop
story.description: Rename the per-task execution retry constant from maxExecutionRetries to maxTaskExecutionRetries (default 2 retries on top of the initial attempt = 3 total dispatches). The existing retryFeedback self-repair mechanism (which already injects prior attempt's exitCode + errorMessage/stderr/validationError into the next prompt) must remain intact and continue to bound the per-task subagent dispatch loop near .pi/extensions/cc-review.ts lines 3503-3696. Do not alter planning retries (maxPlanRetries=3) or structured-report parsing. Add new behavior tests covering (a) failure-then-success retry carrying failure text, (b) total dispatches == maxTaskExecutionRetries + 1 on full failure, (c) single dispatch on first-try success. Update static test assertions and existing behavior test that already used the new name.

project_file_index.role: Implementation site. Rename local constant maxExecutionRetries → maxTaskExecutionRetries (=2). Loop bound becomes attempt <= maxTaskExecutionRetries + 1 (i.e., 3 total dispatches). Keep retryFeedback construction (Exit code, Error, Unresolved items, Output) and prompt augmentation (Previous attempt feedback:) unchanged. Update emitTrace retry maxAttempts label, noteRetry call and log message to use the new total-attempts value. Confine changes to the per-task subagent dispatch loop around lines 3500-3700.

Add a new describe block 'task execution self-repair retry loop (maxTaskExecutionRetries)' with (a)(b)(c) tests using existing piMock/registeredTool harness. Also update the pre-existing 'retry exhaustion for subagent and planning' test: subagentCalls should now equal maxTaskExecutionRetries + 1 = 3.
Update regex patterns from maxExecutionRetries to maxTaskExecutionRetries and the loop bound to attempt <= maxTaskExecutionRetries + 1. Keep the maxPlanRetries=3 assertion intact.

definition_of_done.description: Source declares `const maxTaskExecutionRetries = 2` and the per-task dispatch loop bound uses maxTaskExecutionRetries + 1 (3 total dispatches on full failure). The existing retryFeedback self-repair body remains and is injected via 'Previous attempt feedback:' in the next prompt.
edge_cases: Loop runs at most 3 times when every attempt fails.
retryFeedback contains exitCode and the prior attempt's error/stderr/validationError text.

definition_of_done.description: New behavior tests: (a) first dispatch fails with a recognizable stderr string, second dispatch succeeds and its prompt contains both 'Previous attempt feedback' and the prior failure text — exactly 2 dispatches. (b) every dispatch fails → exactly maxTaskExecutionRetries+1 (=3) dispatches and the final task is marked failed. (c) first-try success → exactly 1 dispatch.
edge_cases: Self-repair text propagation works across the retry boundary.

definition_of_done.description: Existing behavior test 'retry exhaustion for subagent and planning' is updated so subagentCalls equals 3 (= maxTaskExecutionRetries + 1) and still passes alongside the planning side (plannerCalls == 3).
edge_cases: Pre-existing tests in cc-review-behavior.test.ts continue to pass.

definition_of_done.description: Static test (tests/cc-review-static.test.mjs) is updated to reflect the renamed constant and new loop bound, and continues to pass; the maxPlanRetries=3 assertion is preserved.

definition_of_done.verify_command: node --experimental-strip-types tests/cc-review-behavior.test.ts 2>&1 | tail -5; node tests/cc-review-static.test.mjs 2>&1 | tail -5
